subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath ever been and shall ever be as He hath ever been. There is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Bountiful. All praise be unto the Lord of existence and sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی کان و یکون بمثل ما قد کان لا اله الا هو العزیز المنان حمد مالک وجود و سلطان
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
